target: Move secret ownership out of shell startup and establish an explicit env contract for tmux-host profiles and adapters.
invariants: Keep tmux-host as an external host runtime; do not bake Dopemux-specific ownership into host core.
Preserve the source-first repo structure under src/tmux_host/ and the UI docs under docs/ui/.
Do not add broad allowlists or unrelated cleanup.
Secrets must not live in .zshenv or .zshrc.
Required environment validation must fail closed with exact variable names.

commit.message: Define explicit env contract for tmux-host

steps.task: Document the explicit env source model for tmux-host, including env_file, required_env, optional_env, and fail-closed behavior.
requirements: Do not describe shell startup files as secret authority.
Keep operator guidance procedural and exact.
Use the repo structure created by RS-TP-00.

steps.task: Add env contract models and validation helpers so profiles can declare env_file, required_env, and optional_env without relying on ambient shell state.
requirements: Keep the contract bounded to explicit env declarations.
Do not implement adapter execution here beyond helper interfaces if required.
Missing required env must be reported explicitly.

steps.task: Add narrow tests for present and missing required environment cases so env validation is falsifiable.
requirements: Avoid testing unrelated shell behavior here.
